caption: A man wearing a blue medical scrub top, a white face mask, and a patterned surgical cap is seen in profile, facing right. He is positioned in a clinical or educational setting. To his left, a column of white text lists several names, including "Rachel Cermak," "Katherine Coburn," and "Margo Huffman." To the right of the man, a QR code is visible, and above it is the text "CSTARS Simulation Lab." Below this heading, another list of names includes "Mr. Tony Christiansi," "Mr. Dan Goodman," "Maj. Erika Nova," and "Capt. Thomas Ross." A small red rectangular graphic appears in the upper right area. Across the sequence, the man remains stationary and continues to look toward the right side of the frame. The on-screen text and graphical elements remain constant, with the scene remaining still throughout the clip.
